zh.lifeSummary: 當John Troutbeck於大約1412年出生在英國賀特福爾奧可時，他的父親William Troutbeck31歲，母親Lady Joan de Rixton31歲。他於1432年與Lady Margareth Hulse在英國德比夏爾諾波利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1459年9月23日在英國史洛普爾艾拜頓享年48歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波藍德特盧特貝可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Troutbeck于大约1412年出生在英国賀特福爾奧可时，他的父亲William Troutbeck31岁，母亲Lady Joan de Rixton31岁。他于1432年与Lady Margareth Hulse在英国德比夏爾諾波利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1459年9月23日在英国史洛普爾艾拜頓享年48岁，埋葬在英国英格兰波藍德特盧特貝可。

nameMeanings.name: Troutbeck
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Troutbeck (Westm and Cumb).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Troutbeck was born about 1412, in Oxhey, Hertfordshire, England, his father, William Troutbeck, was 31 and his mother, Lady Joan de Rixton, was 31. He married Lady Margareth Hulse in 1432, in Norbury, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 23 September 1459, in Albrighton, Shropshire, England, at the age of 48, and was buried in Troutbeck, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Utkinton, Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire,: Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Troutbeck est né environ 1412, à Oxhey, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Troutbeck, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Joan de Rixton, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margareth Hulse en 1432, à Norbury, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 23 septembre 1459, à Albrighton, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Troutbeck, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Utkinton, Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire,: Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire, England
de.lifeSummary: Als John Troutbeck um 1412 in Oxhey, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Troutbeck 31 und seine Mutter Lady Joan de Rixton 31. Er hat 1432 in Norbury, Derbyshire, England Lady Margareth Hulse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 23. September 1459 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Albrighton, Shropshire, England und wurde in Troutbeck, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Troutbeck è nato il circa 1412 nel Oxhey, Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, William Troutbeck, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Joan de Rixton, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margareth Hulse nel 1432, nel Norbury, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 23 settembre 1459, nel Albrighton, Shropshire, England, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Troutbeck, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Troutbeckが約1412年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアオクスヘイで生まれた時，父William Troutbeckは31歳，母Lady Joan de Rixtonは31歳であった。1432年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアノーブリーでLady Margareth Hulseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1459年9月23日にイギリスシュロプシュアイアアルブリトンで48歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンバーランドトロウトベックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Troutbeck(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 허트퍼드실르 스헤이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Troutbeck(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Joan de Rixton(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1432년 영국 더비실르 노르버이에서 Lady Margareth Hulse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1459년 9월 23일 영국 슈럽실르 알브라이턴에서 48세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠벌랜드 트루트벡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Troutbeck nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Oxhey, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Troutbeck, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Lady Joan de Rixton, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margareth Hulse em 1432, em Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1459, em Albrighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Troutbeck, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Utkinton, Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire,: Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire, England

ru.Utkinton, Dunham on the Hill, Cheshire,: дунам он т хилл, чешир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Troutbeck родился около 1412 г. в местности оксхи, хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Troutbeck было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Joan de Rixton, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margareth Hulse в 1432 г. в местности норбури, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 23 сентября 1459 г. в местности албраитон, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности троутбекк, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Troutbeck nació aproximadamente 1412, en Oxhey, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Troutbeck, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Lady Joan de Rixton, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Lady Margareth Hulse en 1432, en Norbury, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1459, en Albrighton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Troutbeck, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
